diff --git a/llvm/lib/Analysis/LoopAccessAnalysis.cpp b/llvm/lib/Analysis/LoopAccessAnalysis.cpp
index cf3bb6a8eae1..b810b7766d46 100644
--- a/llvm/lib/Analysis/LoopAccessAnalysis.cpp
+++ b/llvm/lib/Analysis/LoopAccessAnalysis.cpp
@@ -418,6 +418,7 @@ bool RuntimeCheckingPtrGroup::addPointer(unsigned Index, const SCEV *Start,
                                          const SCEV *End, unsigned AS,
                                          bool NeedsFreeze,
                                          ScalarEvolution &SE) {
+    if (AddressSpace != AS) return false; // Ensure pointers with different address spaces are not grouped together.
   assert(AddressSpace == AS &&
          "all pointers in a checking group must be in the same address space");
